posts.title: How to Control Armbian Status LEDs Through sysfs (Turn Off / Heartbeat on Radxa Rock 5)
posts.author: Amrut Prabhu
posts.summary: Learn how to control Armbian status LEDs via the Linux sysfs interface. This guide shows how to list available LED triggers, turn off the blue status LED, set it to heartbeat mode on Radxa Rock 5, and make the change persistent across reboots.
